title: Instagram Thumbnails, Posters & Logos
brief: I’m refreshing my brand’s Instagram presence and need a designer who can create a cohesive visual suite that works flawlessly on the platform. The primary purpose of every asset is social-media engagement, so layouts must pop in the feed, respect Instagram’s current sizing rules, and keep file weight light without sacrificing clarity. Deliverables • 5–7 eye-catching thumbnails for Reels/IGTV (1080×1920, layered PSD/AI + ready-to-post PNG) • 2 promotional posters adaptable for both feed (1080×1350) and story (1080×1920) placements • A versatile, memorable logo delivered in vector (AI/SVG) and transparent PNG formats Each piece should share a unified colour palette and typography style so the brand feels instantly recognisable. I’ll supply reference imagery, copy, and hex codes at kickoff; you bring the fresh concepts, modern gradients, and bold type treatments that stop the scroll. Final files must be neatly organised, fully editable, and clearly labelled. My ideal turnaround is seven days from project start. Please include a portfolio link highlighting previous Instagram-focused design work—originality and polish will be key factors in my selection.
